svg.title: Code review for CitizenReport.jsx
svg.desc: Visual code review showing bugs, improvements, and good patterns in CitizenReport.jsx

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I add error handling to the geolocation API in React?')
sendPrompt('How should I handle fetch errors in React with async/await?')
sendPrompt('How do I prevent double-submit in a React form?')
sendPrompt('What validation should I add to a citizen report form in React?')
sendPrompt('How do I use an env variable for an API URL in a React Vite app?')
sendPrompt('Should I use value prop on a textarea in React instead of just onChange?')
sendPrompt('How do I show the selected urgency level visually in React?')
sendPrompt('How do I extract a reusable API call into a custom React hook?')

svg.text: Top priority fix — error handling skeleton:
// Also wrap handleSubmit fetch in try/catch
// and disable submit button when loading:
